phrases.intent_en: Ask where the guided tour meeting point is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde es el punto de encuentro para visitas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh es el POON-toh deh ehn-KWEHN-troh PAH-rah vee-SEE-tahs?

likely_response.local: Junto a la Fuente de Génova, al norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH foo-EHN-teh DEH HÉ-noh-bah AHL NOHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the central fountain, north side.

responses.english: Next to the central fountain, north side.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH foo-EHN-teh DEH HÉ-noh-bah AHL NOHR-teh
responses.french: Junto a la Fuente de Génova, al norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which café has outdoor seating
phrases.text_local: ¿Qué cafetería de la plaza tiene terraza exterior?
phrases.pronunciation: keh kah-feh-teh-REE-ah deh lah PLAH-sah tee-EH-neh teh-RAH-sah ehk-teh-ree-OHR

likely_response.local: Café Central, terraza frente al ayuntamiento.
likely_response.pronunciation: kah-FÉ thehnt-RAHL tehr-RAH-thah FREHN-teh AHL ah-yoon-tah-mee-EHN-toh
likely_response.translation_en: The ones on the north corner, right side.

responses.english: The ones on the north corner, right side.
responses.phonetic: kah-FÉ thehnt-RAHL tehr-RAH-thah FREHN-teh AHL ah-yoon-tah-mee-EHN-toh
responses.french: Café Central, terraza frente al ayuntamiento.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the 19th century building facades are best viewed
phrases.text_local: ¿Desde dónde se ven mejor las fachadas del siglo XIX?
phrases.pronunciation: dehs-deh DOHN-deh seh vehn MEH-hohr lahs fah-KAH-dahs del see-GLOH dee-EHN-tee-NWEH-veh

likely_response.local: Desde el centro, mirando hacia el norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: DEH-sdeh EHL THEHNT-roh mee-RAHN-doh ah-THEE-ah EHL NOHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: From the center, looking towards the north.

responses.english: From the center, looking towards the north.
responses.phonetic: DEH-sdeh EHL THEHNT-roh mee-RAHN-doh ah-THEE-ah EHL NOHR-teh
responses.french: Desde el centro, mirando hacia el norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist information office is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la oficina de información turística?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah o-FEE-see-nah deh een-fohr-mah-SYOHN too-REE-stee-kah?

likely_response.local: Calle Larios, justo al lado del Ayuntamiento.
likely_response.pronunciation: KAHL-leh lah-REE-ohs HOO-stoh AHL LAH-doh DEHL ah-yoon-tah-mee-EHN-toh
likely_response.translation_en: Larios Street, right next to the City Hall.

responses.english: Larios Street, right next to the City Hall.
responses.phonetic: KAHL-leh lah-REE-ohs HOO-stoh AHL LAH-doh DEHL ah-yoon-tah-mee-EHN-toh
responses.french: Calle Larios, justo al lado del Ayuntamiento.
